title: Non-single bit wide signal pos/negedge sensitivity

features.name: multi-bit signal in always block sensitivity list
features.description: Code should include an always block with a multi-bit signal used directly in the sensitivity list event expression

features.name: split multi-bit sensitivity with OR operators
features.description: Code should include an always block where each bit of a multi-bit signal is explicitly listed in the sensitivity list using OR operators as a workaround for multi-bit sensitivity
